# GitHub Template Configuration

When you click "Use this template" on GitHub, this repository will be used as a template for new projects.

For the template to work correctly:

1. Replace `yourusername` with your GitHub username in pyproject.toml
2. Update author information in fastapi_scaffold_with_auth/__init__.py
3. Update .env.example with your preferred defaults
4. Remove the example_project/ if you want a blank slate, or keep it as a reference
